notes: IBM AI Risk Atlas provides a structured catalog of AI risks integrated into the watsonx platform.

data.description: Structured catalog of AI risks integrated into the IBM watsonx platform, covering risks across the AI lifecycle.
data.notes: Conceptual taxonomy of AI risks with slug-based identifiers. Risks are documented in the watsonx documentation. No formal per-item URLs with stable identifiers — risk entries are part of the watsonx docs site.
